'''âh-s-j''' ('''kahasaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:varize|varize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-s-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:varize|varize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-s-j
|-
! Lemma
| kahasaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihasaj|thihasaj]] || [[word:jihasaj|jihasaj]] || [[word:shihasaj|shihasaj]] || [[word:kihasaj|kihasaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhasaj|thuthuhasaj]] || [[word:jujuhasaj|jujuhasaj]] || [[word:shushuhasaj|shushuhasaj]] || [[word:kukuhasaj|kukuhasaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhasaj|thuhasaj]] || [[word:juhasaj|juhasaj]] || [[word:shuhasaj|shuhasaj]] || [[word:kuhasaj|kuhasaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhasaj|thuhasaj]] || [[word:juhasaj|juhasaj]] || [[word:shuhasaj|shuhasaj]] || [[word:kuhasaj|kuhasaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehasaj|thehasaj]] || [[word:jehasaj|jehasaj]] || [[word:shehasaj|shehasaj]] || [[word:kehasaj|kehasaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohasaj|thothohasaj]] || [[word:jojohasaj|jojohasaj]] || [[word:shoshohasaj|shoshohasaj]] || [[word:kokohasaj|kokohasaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohasaj|thohasaj]] || [[word:johasaj|johasaj]] || [[word:shohasaj|shohasaj]] || [[word:kohasaj|kohasaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohasaj|thohasaj]] || [[word:johasaj|johasaj]] || [[word:shohasaj|shohasaj]] || [[word:kohasaj|kohasaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠhasaj|thĂŠhasaj]] || [[word:jĂŠhasaj|jĂŠhasaj]] || [[word:shĂŠhasaj|shĂŠhasaj]] || [[word:kĂŠhasaj|kĂŠhasaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahasaj|thathahasaj]] || [[word:jajahasaj|jajahasaj]] || [[word:shashahasaj|shashahasaj]] || [[word:kakahasaj|kakahasaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahasaj|thahasaj]] || [[word:jahasaj|jahasaj]] || [[word:shahasaj|shahasaj]] || [[word:kahasaj|kahasaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahasaj|thahasaj]] || [[word:jahasaj|jahasaj]] || [[word:shahasaj|shahasaj]] || [[word:kahasaj|kahasaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahasaj|shahasaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahasaj|goshahasaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahasaj|gokishahasaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahasajnĂŒ|shahasajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahasajnknĂŒ|goshahasajnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahasajnĂŒ|gokishahasajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahasajshĂ«|shahasajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahasajnkshĂ«|goshahasajnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahasajshĂ«|gokishahasajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahasajro|shahasajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahasajnkro|goshahasajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahasajro|gokishahasajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahasajmu|shahasajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahasajnkmu|goshahasajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahasajmu|gokishahasajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahasajsher|shahasajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahasajnksher|goshahasajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahasajsher|gokishahasajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahasajng|shahasajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahasajnkng|goshahasajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahasajng|gokishahasajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahasajya|shahasajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahasajnkya|goshahasajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahasajya|gokishahasajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahasajyam|shahasajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahasajnkyam|goshahasajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahasajyam|gokishahasajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahasajnĂŒshĂ«|shahasajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahasajnknĂŒshĂ«|goshahasajnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahasajnĂŒshĂ«|gokishahasajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahasajnĂŒro|shahasajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahasajnknĂŒro|goshahasajnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahasajnĂŒro|gokishahasajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahasajnĂŒmu|shahasajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahasajnknĂŒmu|goshahasajnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahasajnĂŒmu|gokishahasajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahasajshĂ«nĂŒ|shahasajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahasajnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshahasajnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahasajshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishahasajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahasajshĂ«ro|shahasajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahasajnkshĂ«ro|goshahasajnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahasajshĂ«ro|gokishahasajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahasajshĂ«mu|shahasajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahasajnkshĂ«mu|goshahasajnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahasajshĂ«mu|gokishahasajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahasajronĂŒ|shahasajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahasajnkronĂŒ|goshahasajnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahasajronĂŒ|gokishahasajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahasajroshĂ«|shahasajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahasajnkroshĂ«|goshahasajnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahasajroshĂ«|gokishahasajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahasajromu|shahasajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahasajnkromu|goshahasajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahasajromu|gokishahasajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahasajmunĂŒ|shahasajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahasajnkmunĂŒ|goshahasajnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahasajmunĂŒ|gokishahasajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahasajmushĂ«|shahasajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahasajnkmushĂ«|goshahasajnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahasajmushĂ«|gokishahasajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahasajmuro|shahasajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahasajnkmuro|goshahasajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahasajmuro|gokishahasajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|27df60f}}
